items.name: vibe-fishing

items.name: cpa-codex-auth-sweep
items.description: ⚡ High-concurrency async Codex auth credential scanner & cleaner. 200+ coroutines, auto-detect 401/expired tokens, one-click purge. Works as an AI Agent Skill.⚡ 高并发异步 Codex 认证凭证扫描与清理工具。200+ 协程并发、自动识别 401/失效 Token、一键清理死号。可作为 AI Agent Skill 使用。
